description:
Name: Elwynn Dalton

Proficiency: Scouting

Birth: FCU

Age: Classified

Affiliation(s): Frauleins
title: Fraulein der Krieg
unit_description: The scout of Rescue Squad "Capybara". A former mercenary with a long storied history with the Cypherian War, she has since changed her warlike ways into a chill and cozy lifestyle, but the Frauleins do still find her expertise in wooded combat useful. She prefers to be on the field with a mobile sniper rifle while keeping her squad to the minimum, outfitting them with SMGs for self defense. Her skillset is geared for scouting for her team and softening targets behind heavy cover.
